title: CHIPS News & Releases
text:

The Department of Commerce’s CHIPS Program awarded $210 million in direct funding under the CHIPS and Science Act to a subsidiary of Korea Zinc — Crucible...
Department of Commerce and NIST Announce CHIPS Research and Development Letter of Intent with xLight, Inc. for Extreme Ultraviolet Lithography

Department of Commerce Announces CHIPS Incentives Letter of Intent with Vulcan Elements to Support Domestic Manufacturing of Critical Rare Earth Magnets

NIST Issues Broad Agency Announcement for Proposals to Advance Microelectronics Technologies

U.S. Department of Commerce Appoints Bill Frauenhofer as Director of CHIPS Program Office
The U.S. Department of Commerce today announced the hiring of Bill Frauenhofer as the Director of the CHIPS Program Office. Mr. Frauenhofer will assume...
President Trump Secures $200B Investment from Micron Technology for Memory Chip Manufacturing in the United States
Trump Administration restores chipmaking leadership in the United States with historic investment in Idaho, New York, and Virginia.
